authorization.reference: Operator requested deterministic model navigation, minimal paperwork, reliable state tracking and recovery, and optional worktrees; product delivery remains the goal.

scope.summary: Make model navigation deterministic and state recovery reliable with minimal YAML/JSON plus native Git, without adding product code or governance executables.
in_scope: Single-packet detailed state and recovery checkpoints

acceptance_matrix.requirement: A no-context model can deterministically select authority and resume active work from START_HERE.yaml, the taskboard active ID, and packet.json.
evidence: START_HERE.yaml declares a four-file ordered startup set, conditional reads, task profiles, and packet checkpoint resume fields.
Invariant check resolved current_focus.active_wp_id to the matching packet identity.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: Project rules enforce product-first minimal paperwork through explicit DIRECT, TRACKED, and EXPANDED triggers.
evidence: FF-CODEX-040 through FF-CODEX-047 enforce product-first governance, profile triggers, state, recovery, worktrees, and deterministic navigation.
WORK_PACKET_REQUIREMENTS.yaml preserves all FF-WPR-001 through FF-WPR-040 IDs while making conditional material trigger-based.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: The taskboard contains only the packet index and active focus while packet.json contains detailed lifecycle, proof, and recovery state.
evidence: Invariant check proved taskboard work_packets entries contain only wp_id and packet and that no counts key exists.
Negative probes rejected derived counts, copied lifecycle status, and a missing active packet.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: Optional worktrees use native Git create, inspect, clean-remove, repair, and prune-preview commands without committed physical paths.
evidence: git worktree list --porcelain showed the locked WP-FF-001 worktree on codex/governance-low-friction.
git worktree repair and git worktree prune --dry-run --verbose exited 0.
Invariant and negative-path checks rejected committed machine-local worktree paths.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: Recovery uses a checkpoint commit on a remote-backed work branch.
evidence: Implementation checkpoint cf9d47ab8145b0ad182bc696bf81db059defbbff was committed on codex/governance-low-friction.
git push created origin/codex/governance-low-friction and git ls-remote returned the same SHA.

acceptance_matrix.requirement: Closure becomes VALIDATED only after git merge-base proves the closure commit is contained in main.
evidence: Negative probe passed: git merge-base --is-ancestor rejected a non-commit closure object with exit 128.
git merge-base --is-ancestor cf9d47ab8145b0ad182bc696bf81db059defbbff main exited 0 after merge commit 7eda44ec9f0b37e4742e25d44afffa78e4567773.

checks_run: YAML and JSON parse: PASS for all changed authority/state files
Adversarial state-drift and physical-path probes: PASS
git push and git ls-remote: origin/codex/governance-low-friction at c201babcd20ec0b9327bdfee19af0ea2657b6d1f
last_checkpoint.next_action: Commit this validated closure state and push main.

checks.result: YAML/JSON parsing passed for all changed authority, template, taskboard, registry, and packet files.
Rule-ID, ID-registry, taskboard/packet, topology, bootstrap-mirror, scope, and no-product-edit invariants passed.
Negative probes rejected derived taskboard state, copied lifecycle state, a missing active packet, a physical worktree path, and an invalid closure object.
Native Git worktree list, repair, and prune preview passed; the packet worktree remains locked.
git diff --check and git fsck --no-dangling passed.
Branch checkpoint cf9d47ab8145b0ad182bc696bf81db059defbbff was pushed and independently resolved from origin.
